positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_luke
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~baby_multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~spends_time(luke)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~baby_multiple_birth(X0) | multiple_birth(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth(X0) | spends_time(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~spends_time(X0) | lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(X0) | ~lives_at_home(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define has_siblings_together(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complains(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
